faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about creating a professional email signature.

questions.q: How do I add the signature to Gmail?
questions.a: Click the 'Copy Signature' button, then open Gmail Settings > General > Signature. Paste the signature into the box and save changes.
Yes! You can create and use your signature for free. No account or subscription required.
Absolutely. Our signatures are tested for compatibility with Outlook, Apple Mail, and all major email clients.
Yes, we use table-based layouts that ensure your signature looks professional on both desktop and mobile devices.

questions.q: Can I use my own company logo?
questions.a: Yes, you can upload any image and it will be auto-optimized for your signature.
